SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder

Class TacletGoalTemplate

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.rules.tacletbuilder.TacletGoalTemplate
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.TacletGoalTemplate
Direct Known Subclasses:
AntecSuccTacletGoalTemplate, RewriteTacletGoalTemplate
public class TacletGoalTemplate extends TacletGoalTemplate
this class contains the goals of the schematic theory specific rules (Taclet). There are new sequents that have to be added, new rules and rule variables. The replacewith-goal is implemented in subclasses

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • TacletGoalTemplate

      public TacletGoalTemplate(Sequent addedSeq, ImmutableList<Taclet> addedRules, ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> addedProgVars)
      creates new Goaldescription
      Parameters:
      addedSeq - new Sequent to be added
      addedRules - IList contains the new allowed rules at this branch
      addedProgVars - a SetOf which will be instantiated with a application time unused (new) program variables that are introduced by an application of this template

    • TacletGoalTemplate

      public TacletGoalTemplate(Sequent addedSeq, ImmutableList<Taclet> addedRules)
      creates new Goaldescription same effect as new TacletGoalTemplate(addedSeq, addedRules, SetAsListOf.nil())
      Parameters:
      addedSeq - new Sequent to be added
      addedRules - IList contains the new allowed rules at this branch

  • Method Details

    • replaceWithExpressionAsObject

      public Object replaceWithExpressionAsObject()
      a Taclet may replace parts of sequent.
      Overrides:
      replaceWithExpressionAsObject in class TacletGoalTemplate
      Returns:
      term (or sequent) to be placed instead of the findexp-term. REMARK: returns 'null' if there is no replace-with part ! Overwritten in subclasses !

    • rules

      public final ImmutableList<Taclet> rules()
      the goal of a Taclet may introduce new rules. Call this method to get them
      Overrides:
      rules in class TacletGoalTemplate
      Returns:
      IList contains new introduced rules

    • getBoundVariables

      public ImmutableSet<QuantifiableVariable> getBoundVariables()
      retrieves and returns all variables that are bound in the goal template
      Specified by:
      getBoundVariables in class TacletGoalTemplate
      Returns:
      all variables that occur bound in this goal template
